hooks.command: $json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $fp = ($json | ConvertFrom-Json).tool_input.file_path; if ($fp -like '*PesquisaSatisfacaoSPA*') { Push-Location 'C:\Users\estagio.ti\Desktop\ClaudeCode\PesquisaSatisfacaoSPA'; $s = git status --porcelain 2>&1; if ($s) { git add -A; git commit -m "auto: $(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')"; git push origin main } ; Pop-Location } 2>$null
